docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WISCHERATH, TOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT ZFC CONCEPTS, LLC, A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SLOANE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
